root.name: Overall Task Success: Add bullet and resize image (Slide 2)
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully added the requested bullet point at the end of the list on slide 2, and resized the image to prevent overlap as requested.

children.name: Correct Addition of the Required Bullet Point (Slide 2)
children.description: Checks if, on slide 2, a new bullet point with the exact required text was added at the end of the bulleted list.

children.name: Bullet Point Exists with Correct Text
children.description: Verifies that there is a bullet point with the exact text 'All three axes intersect at the aircraft's center of gravity' on slide 2.
children.reason: Bullet point with required text NOT found on slide 2.

children.name: Bullet Point is at List End
children.description: Checks that the new bullet point appears as the last item in the bulleted list on slide 2.
children.reason: Could not find list containing the required bullet.

The criterion received a score of zero because the required bullet point with the exact text "All three axes intersect at the aircraft's center of gravity" was not found on slide 2 at all. Since the bullet point doesn't exist, it also cannot be positioned at the end of the bulleted list as required. Both critical sub-criteria failed completely, indicating that the specified addition was not made to the presentation.

children.name: Resizing of Image to Avoid Overlap (Slide 2)
children.description: Checks that the relevant image on slide 2 has been resized as needed, and that the bullet text and image no longer overlap.

children.name: Image Was Resized Compared to Original
children.description: Verifies that at least one image on slide 2 has been resized compared to the original presentation.
children.reason: No image on slide 2 was resized compared to original.

children.name: Bullet and Image No Longer Overlap Visually (Screenshot)
children.description: Using VLM, ensures that after modifications, the new bullet and the image do not overlap on slide 2.
children.reason: No overlap present between bullet and image.

The criterion received a failing score because the critical requirement of actually resizing an image on slide 2 was not met - no image was resized compared to the original presentation. While the visual analysis confirmed that there's no longer any overlap between the bullet text and image, this alone wasn't sufficient since the fundamental task of resizing wasn't completed. The failure to meet the critical sub-criterion resulted in an overall failing score, regardless of the successful resolution of the overlap issue.

children.name: Extraneous Changes Check
children.description: Checks that no significant, unwarranted changes were made to slide 2 or elsewhere in the presentation aside from those requested.

children.name: No Extraneous Content Added or Removed (Slide 2)
children.description: Check that, on slide 2, only the expected bullet and resizing were performed; no extra elements or major changes were added/removed.
children.reason: No extraneous content changes on slide 2.

children.name: No Unwarranted Changes Elsewhere in Presentation
children.description: Checks that no major extraneous edits (slides, shapes, text, images, animations, transitions) were made to other slides in the deck.
children.reason: No unwarranted changes elsewhere in presentation.

The presentation successfully met the extraneous changes check because only the requested modifications were made without any unnecessary additions or alterations. Slide 2 was properly updated with just the expected bullet point and resizing changes, while the rest of the presentation remained untouched with no unwarranted edits to other slides, shapes, text, images, animations, or transitions. This demonstrates careful adherence to the specific instructions without introducing any extraneous modifications.

root.reason: The criterion received a failing score because both critical requirements were completely unmet. The agent failed to add the required bullet point "All three axes intersect at the aircraft's center of gravity" to slide 2, meaning this essential text addition simply doesn't exist in the presentation. Additionally, no image resizing was performed on slide 2, which was necessary to prevent overlap issues. Since both critical sub-criteria failed entirely while only the non-critical extraneous changes check passed, the overall task was unsuccessful.

metadata.task: On slide 2, Add a new bullet point at the end of the list that says 'All three axes intersect at the aircraft's center of gravity'. Resize the image to avoid overlap.
